command:
echo "=== current gitea version ==="
/usr/local/bin/gitea --version

echo "=== check latest gitea release ==="
curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/releases/latest | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(chr(116)+chr(97)+chr(103)+chr(95)+chr(110)+chr(97)+chr(109)+chr(101), chr(110)+chr(111)+chr(110)+chr(101)))"

echo "=== check gitea releases page ==="
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/releases?per_page=5" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
releases = json.load(sys.stdin)
for r in releases:
    print(r.get(chr(116)+chr(97)+chr(103)+chr(95)+chr(110)+chr(97)+chr(109)+chr(101)), r.get(chr(112)+chr(114)+chr(101)+chr(114)+chr(101)+chr(108)+chr(101)+chr(97)+chr(115)+chr(101)), r.get(chr(100)+chr(114)+chr(97)+chr(102)+chr(116)))
"

echo "=== arch check ==="
uname -m
dpkg --print-architecture
